Curriculum Vitae

A professional record shaped by audit discipline, sector breadth, and structured technical fluency.

This CV brings together my audit perspective, practical engagement exposure, and supporting technical capability in one editable and current format. It is intended to reflect clear professional judgment, review-ready communication, and disciplined execution.

05 // Curriculum Vitae

Professional Summary

Audit-oriented work with formal documentation standards and growing systems fluency.

I contribute across audit assignments that require careful evidence review, practical sector awareness, and clear working-paper structure. Alongside that work, I continue building fluency in technical tools and systems that improve reporting quality, workflow discipline, and information management.

Professional experience

January 2024 to Present
Audit and assurance exposure

PYC and Associates Chartered Accountants

Professional practice

Supporting audit assignments through evidence review, ledger analysis, working-paper preparation, and structured documentation across multiple sectors.

  • Contributed to audit work requiring careful review of records, reconciliations, and supporting documentation.
  • Strengthened file quality by organizing observations and evidence in a clearer, review-ready structure.
  • Worked across varied sectors where procedures, communication, and business context needed to adapt without losing rigor.
deployed_code
Ongoing
Technical development

Self-directed software and workflow learning

Independent practice

Extending professional capability through web, software, and systems-oriented work that complements audit practice with stronger technical confidence.

  • Built and refined portfolio pages with reusable styling, editable content structures, and clearer interface organization.
  • Developed stronger fluency in Linux, server context, and software workflows relevant to modern business operations.
  • Used technical experimentation to improve how information is structured, maintained, and communicated.

Sector exposure

Audit exposure across regulated, operational, and mission-driven sectors has strengthened practical judgment, documentation adaptability, and client-context awareness.

Banking Manufacturing Insurance Foreign Transactions Information Technology Education Non-Profit Organizations Consulting

Education and professional direction

  • BBS Program with continuing focus on formal financial understanding and business context.
  • Chartered Accountant pathway supported by practical engagement exposure and structured professional development.
  • Ongoing emphasis on communication quality, documentation standards, and responsible professional growth.

Audit and documentation
